color/color.ts.name: hexToHSL
color/color.ts.description: Converts a hex color string to an HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) object.

color/color.ts.name: hexToNormalizedRGB
color/color.ts.description: Converts a hexadecimal color string to an RGB tuple normalized between 0 and 1.

color/color.ts.name: hexToRGB
color/color.ts.description: Converts a hex color string to an RGB tuple [r, g, b].

color/color.ts.name: interpolateColor
color/color.ts.description: Linearly interpolates between two RGB colors based on a factor (0-1) and returns a CSS rgb() string.

color/color.ts.name: isDarkColor
color/color.ts.description: Determines whether a color is "dark" based on a standard WCAG-inspired luminance threshold (0.179). Works with both HEX and RGB formats.

color/color.ts.name: isLumGreaterThan
color/color.ts.description: Determines whether the luminance of a color is above the given threshold.

color/color.ts.name: isLumLessThan
color/color.ts.description: Determines whether the luminance of a color (in RGB array or HEX format) is less than the specified threshold. Uses `getLuminance()` internally.

common/array.ts.name: createFixedLengthArray
common/array.ts.description: Validates and returns an array with a fixed numeric length at the type level.

common/array.ts.name: every
common/array.ts.description: Safe every wrapper that supports both Type Guards and standard boolean checks.

common/array.ts.name: filter
common/array.ts.description: Type-safe filter wrapper that preserves TypeScript type guards and inference.

common/array.ts.name: filterNonNullable
common/array.ts.description: Shortcut utility to filter out all null and undefined values from an array.

common/array.ts.name: flat
common/array.ts.description: Type-safe flat for 1-level nested arrays using reduce.

common/array.ts.name: flatMap
common/array.ts.description: Type-safe flatMap implementation for environments lacking native support.

common/array.ts.name: forEach
common/array.ts.description: Safe forEach wrapper with correct type inference for ReadonlyArrays.

common/array.ts.name: forEachUnion
common/array.ts.description: Iterates over single arrays or unions of arrays, flattening them for uniform processing.

common/array.ts.name: includes
common/array.ts.description: Type-safe wrapper for Array.prototype.includes that acts as a type guard.

common/array.ts.name: map
common/array.ts.description: Safe map wrapper providing consistent type inference for ReadonlyArrays.

common/array.ts.name: readAllItems
common/array.ts.description: Returns a shallow copy of an array to prevent unintended mutations of the original.

common/array.ts.name: reduce
common/array.ts.description: Safe reduce wrapper with correct type inference for ReadonlyArrays.

common/array.ts.name: some
common/array.ts.description: Safe some wrapper with correct type inference for ReadonlyArrays.

common/object.ts.name: create
common/object.ts.description: Creates a new object with the specified prototype.

common/object.ts.name: entries
common/object.ts.description: Returns an array of an object's own enumerable string-keyed [key, value] pairs with preserved inference.

common/object.ts.name: fromEntries
common/object.ts.description: Constructs an object from an array of key-value entries with explicit type safety.

common/object.ts.name: get
common/object.ts.description: Safely retrieves a nested property from an object using dot-notation pathing.

common/object.ts.name: has
common/object.ts.description: Checks if a nested property exists in an object using dot-notation (e.g., 'user.profile.id').

common/object.ts.name: is
common/object.ts.description: Determines whether two values are the same value. Corrects behavior for NaN and signed zeros.

common/object.ts.name: keys
common/object.ts.description: Returns the keys of an object as a typed array of its own keys.

common/object.ts.name: PrototypeOf
common/object.ts.description: Returns the prototype of the given object.

common/object.ts.name: set
common/object.ts.description: Safely sets a nested property on an object using dot-notation, creating intermediate objects as needed.

common/object.ts.name: values
common/object.ts.description: Returns an array of an object's own enumerable string-keyed property values.

computation/index.ts.name: clamp
computation/index.ts.description: Restricts a value to be within a defined minimum and maximum range.

computation/index.ts.name: computeDelta
computation/index.ts.description: Calculates the net and absolute difference between two numbers or BigInts.

computation/index.ts.name: computeMean
computation/index.ts.description: Calculates the arithmetic mean of an array of numbers or BigInts.

computation/index.ts.name: computePercentageChange
computation/index.ts.description: Calculates the percentage increase or decrease between two values.

computation/index.ts.name: computeRatio
computation/index.ts.description: Generates a ratio as a percentage, optimized for pass/fail metrics.

computation/index.ts.name: isAnomaly
computation/index.ts.description: Statistical outlier detection based on standard deviations from the mean.

computation/index.ts.name: Percentage
computation/index.ts.description: Calculates the percentage of a value relative to a total, with BigInt safety and rounding.

computation/index.ts.name: round
computation/index.ts.description: Rounds a number to a specified number of decimal places.

computation/index.ts.name: welfordUpdate
computation/index.ts.description: Efficiently updates running mean and variance using Welford's algorithm.

debug/debug.ts.name: getCallerLocation
debug/debug.ts.description: Parses the stack trace to identify the file, line, and column of the calling function.

debug/debug.ts.name: highlight
debug/debug.ts.description: Wraps text in ANSI color codes for stylized terminal output.

debug/debug.ts.name: logDev
debug/debug.ts.description: Environment-aware logger that restricts output to development mode, supports semantic log types, and auto-formats table data.

debug/debug.ts.name: serialize
debug/debug.ts.description: Safely serializes any value, including BigInts and circular structures, into a pretty-printed string.

deep-operations/deep-clone.ts.name: cloneDeep
deep-operations/deep-clone.ts.description: Creates a complete recursive copy of a value, preserving the original's structure and prototypes.

deep-operations/deep-equal.ts.name: areDeepEqual
deep-operations/deep-equal.ts.description: Performs a recursive equality check between two values.

deep-operations/deep-merge.ts.name: mergeDeep
deep-operations/deep-merge.ts.description: Deeply merges multiple objects passed as individual arguments.

deep-operations/deep-merge.ts.name: mergeDeepArray
deep-operations/deep-merge.ts.description: Deeply merges an array of objects into a single object.

dom/events.ts.name: getKeyboardAction
dom/events.ts.description: Interprets a keyboard event and returns semantic information about the user's intent.

dom/media.ts.name: normalizeImageSrc
dom/media.ts.description: Extracts a clean URL string from various image source types, including bundler imports and static objects.

dom/media.ts.name: preloadImages
dom/media.ts.description: Preloads and caches images using Image.decode() for non-blocking rendering and LRU management.

link/link-utils.ts.name: extractRelativePath
link/link-utils.ts.description: Safely extracts the pathname from absolute or relative internal URLs, ensuring a leading slash.

link/link-utils.ts.name: handleInternalHashScroll
link/link-utils.ts.description: Manages smooth scrolling for internal anchor links with cross-browser safety checks.

link/link-utils.ts.name: normalizeUrl
link/link-utils.ts.description: Standardizes various URL inputs (strings, URL instances, or objects) into a single clean string URL.

link/link-utils.ts.name: stripHash
link/link-utils.ts.description: Removes the hash fragment (#) from a URL while preserving the path and query parameters.

processors/network.ts.name: delay
processors/network.ts.description: Returns a Promise that resolves after a specified duration in milliseconds.

processors/network.ts.name: fetchJson
processors/network.ts.description: Fetches and parses JSON from a URL with detailed error handling.

processors/network.ts.name: retry
processors/network.ts.description: Executes an async function with exponential backoff and jitter on failure.

processors/react.ts.name: extractDOMProps
processors/react.ts.description: Strips custom component props to return only valid HTML attributes for a specific element.

processors/react.ts.name: filterChildrenByDisplayName
processors/react.ts.description: Filters a React children tree to find components matching a specific displayName.

processors/react.ts.name: getRefCurrent
processors/react.ts.description: Safely extracts the current value from either RefObjects or ForwardedRefs.

processors/react.ts.name: lazyProxy
processors/react.ts.description: Transparently caches the results of function properties upon first access.

processors/react.ts.name: mergeCssVars
processors/react.ts.description: Safely merges a dictionary of CSS variables into a React CSSProperties object.

processors/react.ts.name: mergeEventHandlerClicks
processors/react.ts.description: Orchestrates user and internal click handlers, allowing user-level preventDefault() to block internal logic.

processors/react.ts.name: mergeRefs
processors/react.ts.description: Consolidates multiple React refs (callback or object) into a single functional ref.

transformers/object-transformers.ts.name: capitalizeArray
transformers/object-transformers.ts.description: Capitalizes the first letter of every string in an array.

transformers/object-transformers.ts.name: capitalizedKeys
transformers/object-transformers.ts.description: Extracts and capitalizes an object's keys, filtering for those starting with letters.

transformers/object-transformers.ts.name: generateKeyMap
transformers/object-transformers.ts.description: Creates a typed mapping of original keys to transformed strings using a prefix/suffix pattern.

transformers/object-transformers.ts.name: toKeyByField
transformers/object-transformers.ts.description: Normalizes an array of objects into a record keyed by a specific field.

transformers/string-transformers.ts.name: capitalizeString
transformers/string-transformers.ts.description: Capitalizes the first character of a string while maintaining TypeScript literal types.

transformers/string-transformers.ts.name: toCamelCase
transformers/string-transformers.ts.description: Converts a string from any format (snake, kebab, space) into camelCase.

transformers/string-transformers.ts.name: toKebabCase
transformers/string-transformers.ts.description: Converts a string into kebab-case, ideal for URLs and CSS class names.

transformers/string-transformers.ts.name: toSnakeCase
transformers/string-transformers.ts.description: Converts a string into snake_case, commonly used for database and API fields.

validations/assertions.ts.name: assertValue
validations/assertions.ts.description: Asserts that a value passes a type guard check, throwing an error if it fails while preserving TS narrowing.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: hasDefinedKeys
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Factory that creates a type guard to verify an object contains a specific set of required, non-undefined keys.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isArrayOf
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Verifies that a value is an array where every element satisfies a provided type guard.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isInArray
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Creates an O(1) optimized type guard to check if a value exists within a predefined array.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isKeyInObject
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Narrows an unknown value to an object containing a specific property key, allowing safe property access.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isKeyOfArray
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Validates if a primitive value exists within a specific readonly array of allowed keys.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isKeyOfObject
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Validates if a value is a valid property key (string, number, or symbol) of a specific object.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isRecordOf
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Validates that a value is an object where all property values pass a specific type guard.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isShape
guards/core/composite.ts.description: Factory for creating recursive structural type guards that validate an object against a schema of guards.

guards/core/composite.ts.name: isType
guards/core/composite.ts.description: A helper to execute a type guard schema against a value for immediate narrowing.

guards/core/link-guards.ts.name: isAbsoluteUrl
guards/core/link-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string is a valid absolute URL that can be parsed by the browser's URL constructor.

guards/core/link-guards.ts.name: isInternalUrl
guards/core/link-guards.ts.description: Checks if a URL is a relative path or an absolute URL matching the current window's origin.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isBigInt
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a BigInt.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isBoolean
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a boolean (true or false).

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isInteger
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Checks whether a value is a valid integer.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isNonEmptyString
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a string with a length greater than zero (excluding whitespace).

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isNumber
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a number, excluding NaN and Infinity.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isPrimitive
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates if a value is any of the basic JS primitives: string, number, boolean, or bigint.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isString
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a string.

guards/core/primitives.ts.name: isSymbol
guards/core/primitives.ts.description: Validates that a value is a unique JavaScript symbol.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isArray
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is an Array.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isDefined
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Ensures a value is neither null nor undefined.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isDefinedObject
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Narrows a value to a non-null, indexable object for deep operations.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isFunction
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is a callable function.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isInstanceOf
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Checks if a value is an instance of a specific class constructor.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isMap
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is an instance of a Map.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isNil
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Checks if a value is null or undefined (nullish).

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isNull
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is explicitly null.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isObject
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is a non-null, non-array object.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isRecord
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is a non-null object (and not an array)

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isSet
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is an instance of a Set.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isUndefined
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is undefined.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isWeakMap
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is an instance of a WeakMap.

guards/core/reference.ts.name: isWeakSet
guards/core/reference.ts.description: Validates that a value is an instance of a WeakSet.

guards/core/refined.ts.name: isBufferLikeObject
guards/core/refined.ts.description: Validates if an object matches the shape of a serialized Buffer (e.g., { type: 'Buffer', data: number[] }).

guards/core/refined.ts.name: isEmail
guards/core/refined.ts.description: Validates if a string follows a standard email format using regex.

guards/core/refined.ts.name: isPhoneNumber
guards/core/refined.ts.description: Validates a string against common US, EU, and generic phone number regex patterns.

guards/core/refined.ts.name: isRGBTuple
guards/core/refined.ts.description: Checks if a value is a valid RGB tuple: an array of exactly three numbers between 0 and 255.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isCamelCase
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string follows camelCase naming conventions.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isHexByteString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Factory that creates a guard to validate if a string is a valid hex byte string, optionally enforcing length.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isHexColor
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string is a valid 3 or 6-digit HEX color code.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isHTMLString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Checks if a string contains HTML tags using regex detection.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isJSONArrayString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Verifies if a string is a valid JSON-serialized array.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isJSONObjectString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Verifies if a string is a valid JSON-serialized object.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isJsonString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string is a valid JSON-serialized array or object.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isKebabCase
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string follows kebab-case naming conventions.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isRGBString
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string is a valid CSS rgb() or rgba() string.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isSnakeCase
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a string follows snake_case naming conventions.

guards/core/string-guards.ts.name: isTuple3
guards/core/string-guards.ts.description: Validates if a value is an array of exactly three non-NaN numbers.

guards/react/dom-guards.ts.name: isDOMEntry
guards/react/dom-guards.ts.description: Validates if a key-value pair entry represents a valid DOM property for a specific HTML element type.

guards/react/dom-guards.ts.name: isDOMPropKey
guards/react/dom-guards.ts.description: Type guard to verify if an unknown value is a string that represents a valid DOM property.

guards/react/dom-guards.ts.name: isPropValid
guards/react/dom-guards.ts.description: Memoized validator that checks if a string is a standard DOM attribute, SVG attribute, or React event handler.

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: createPropGuard
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Factory that creates a type guard for specific component props.

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: hasNameMetadata
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Checks if a component type has identifiable metadata (displayName, name, or type).

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: hasOnClick
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Validates if a React element has a valid onClick function in its props.

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: isElementLike
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Validates if an object mimics the shape of a React element (having type and props).

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: isElementOfType
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Checks if a React-like element matches a specific set of allowed HTML tag types.

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: isFragment
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Checks if a React element is a Fragment (<>...</>).

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: isReactElement
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Alias for React's isValidElement to identify valid React elements.

guards/react/node-guards.ts.name: isValidReactNode
guards/react/node-guards.ts.description: Validates if a value is a valid ReactNode (primitives, elements, portals, or arrays of nodes).

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: hasChildren
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Validates if a props object contains a defined children property.

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isComponentType
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Determines if a value is a valid React Component (Function or Class Component).

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isForwardRef
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Validates if a component is wrapped in React.forwardRef.

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isPromise
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Checks if a value is a Promise or a "Thenable" by validating the existence of a .then() method.

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isReactPortal
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Validates if a value is a ReactPortal created via ReactDOM.createPortal.

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isRef
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Validates if a value is a valid React Ref, covering both Callback Refs and Object Refs (createRef/useRef).

guards/react/react-primitive.ts.name: isRefObject
guards/react/react-primitive.ts.description: Specifically narrows a Ref type to an object containing a .current property (RefObject).

types/primitives/objects.ts.name: type
types/primitives/objects.ts.description: Extracts a union of all possible property values from an object, interface, or array.

types/utilities/async/index.ts.name: type
types/utilities/async/index.ts.description: Maps over an object type and wraps every property value in a Promise.

types/utilities/core/index.ts.name: type
types/utilities/core/index.ts.description: Enforces a dependency rule where a specific key's value determines if another key is required or forbidden.

types/utilities/string-casings/camel-cas.name: type
types/utilities/string-casings/camel-cas.description: Recursively transforms a string or string union into camelCase by normalizing separators and word boundaries.

types/utilities/string-casings/kebab-cas.name: type
types/utilities/string-casings/kebab-cas.description: Recursively transforms a string into kebab-case (e.g., hello-world), ideal for CSS classes and URLs.

types/utilities/string-casings/snake-cas.name: type
types/utilities/string-casings/snake-cas.description: Recursively transforms a string into snake_case (e.g., hello_world), ideal for database or API keys.
